revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 24''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 24th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 24 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:24 رجب]] [[fa:۲۴ رجب]] [[id:24 Rajab]] [[sd:24 رجب]] [[ur:24 رجب]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 24''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 24th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 24 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:24 رجب]] [[fa:۲۴ رجب]] [[id:24 Rajab]] [[sd:24 رجب]] [[ur:24 رجب]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 24''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 24th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 24 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:24 رجب]] [[fa:۲۴ رجب]] [[id:24 Rajab]] [[sd:24 رجب]] [[ur:24 رجب]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121941)
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Rajab}}

'''Rajab 24''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 24th day of the month [[Rajab]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]

[[Category:Days 24 of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Rajab]]
[[ar:24 رجب]]

[[id:24 Rajab]]
[[sd:24 رجب]]
[[ur:24 رجب]]
{{Islamic Calendar}}
